lines.speaker: Ambassador Spanfipple
lines.text: It's all very bright round here, isn't it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, it is the White Knights' Castle.

lines.speaker: Ambassador Spanfipple
lines.text: I think it would all look better in a nice dark green. At least then I wouldn't be squinting all the time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, but then they'd have to become the Dark Green Knights. Doesn't really have the same ring to it.

lines.speaker: Ambassador Spanfipple
lines.text: Bah, humans have no sense of style...

lines.speaker: Ambassador Spanfipple
lines.text: Thank you kindly. I haven't got used to this human food and drink yet.

lines.speaker: Ambassador Spanfipple
lines.text: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.

lines.speaker: Ambassador Spanfipple
lines.text: It's all very white round here, isn't it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, it is the White Knights' Castle.

lines.speaker: Ambassador Spanfipple
lines.text: I think it would all look better in pink. At least then I wouldn't be squinting all the time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, but then they'd have to become the Pink Knights. I think they'd have problems recruiting then.

lines.speaker: Ambassador Spanfipple
lines.text: You're probably right. Maybe brown, then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think that may be worse...

lines.speaker: Ambassador Spanfipple
lines.text: Bah, humans have no sense of style...
